claims.claim: The slide-generation pipeline is ordered as sources, evidence, story, visual aids, render, critique, audit, QA, and export.
claims.evidence: README.md describes the safer flow as sources -> evidence -> story -> visual aids -> render -> critique -> audit -> QA -> export.

claims.claim: Every factual slide claim must appear in claim-ledger.json.
claims.evidence: README.md states that every factual slide claim must appear in claim-ledger.json.

claims.claim: The repo supports Codex through .agents/skills/slide-generator and Claude Code through .claude/skills/slide-generator.
claims.evidence: README.md lists the Codex and Claude Code runtime skill mirror paths.

claims.claim: The first renderer should target standalone HTML before PPTX.
claims.evidence: docs/renderer-strategy.md says the first renderer should target standalone HTML before PPTX.

claims.claim: A Marp-style HTML deck can provide presenter view through the ?view=presenter URL.
claims.evidence: docs/renderer-strategy.md notes that presenter view is built in through ?view=presenter.

claims.claim: The renderer can be run with node scripts/render-marp.mjs <project-dir> --html.
